title: #elseif
breadcrumbs: ProcScript: Precompiler Directives and Uniface Constants
text: #elseif Declares an alternative condition to that introduced by the preceding #if precompiler directive, and executes the containing ProcScripts and precompiler directives when the condition is met. #if ( Expression_1 ) ... ProcScript statements and precompiler directives { #elseif ( Expression_2 ) ... ProcScript statements and precompiler directives ... ... } { #else ... ProcScript statements and precompiler directives ... } #endif For more details, see #if . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
